sections.title: Our Services
sections.content: At Latitude Zero Cottages Kikorongo, we offer more than just a place to stay. Our goal is to provide a comprehensive experience that blends comfort, relaxation, and adventure in one of Uganda most beautiful regions.
sections.meta_description: Latitude Zero Cottages offers comfortable rooms, dining, safari adventures, and amenities near Queen Elizabeth National Park.

sections.title: Comfortable Accommodation
sections.content:
Our cottages are designed for guests who value comfort, peace, and a natural environment. Each room offers modern amenities, comfortable bedding, and a peaceful atmosphere.
---
https://res.cloudinary.com/daoxmqexa/image/upload/v1781565889/latitude_zero/IMG_3384_bdvlsz.jpg|Standard Room|A cozy room with comfortable bedding and all essential amenities for a restful stay. Perfect for solo travelers or couples.|From $45/night
https://res.cloudinary.com/daoxmqexa/image/upload/v1781565896/latitude_zero/IMG_3385_msr32r.jpg|Deluxe Room|Extra spacious room with premium furnishings and scenic views of the surrounding landscape. Ideal for those who want more space.|From $65/night
https://res.cloudinary.com/daoxmqexa/image/upload/v1781565892/latitude_zero/IMG_3388_z4jg8c.jpg|Family Cottage|Generous space and a private cottage setting with separate sleeping areas. Perfect for families and groups.|From $85/night

sections.title: Delicious Dining
sections.content:
A good stay deserves good food. Enjoy our locally sourced, freshly prepared meals. Our menu features a blend of traditional Ugandan dishes and continental favorites.
---
https://res.cloudinary.com/daoxmqexa/image/upload/v1781565884/latitude_zero/IMG_3383_aqfgti.jpg|Local Ugandan Cuisine|Authentic Ugandan dishes prepared with fresh, locally sourced ingredients. Experience the rich flavours of Western Uganda.|Meals from $8/person
https://res.cloudinary.com/daoxmqexa/image/upload/v1781565893/latitude_zero/IMG_3389_th256l.jpg|International Cuisine|A selection of international favourites to suit every palate, from continental breakfasts to hearty dinners.|Meals from $10/person
https://res.cloudinary.com/daoxmqexa/image/upload/v1781565891/latitude_zero/IMG_3392_pvjln4.jpg|Refreshments & Bar|Enjoy refreshing drinks, specialty cocktails, and a wide selection of beverages in our lounge and outdoor areas.|Drinks from $3

sections.title: Safari Adventures
sections.content:
Stay close to wildlife, nature and adventure at Queen Elizabeth National Park.
fas fa-binoculars|Game drives
fas fa-paw|Wildlife viewing
fas fa-dove|Bird watching
fas fa-camera|Photography safaris
fas fa-leaf|Nature walks
fas fa-ship|Boat cruises

sections.title: Amenities
sections.content:
Everything you need for a comfortable and memorable stay.
fas fa-wifi|24/7 Internet Connection|High-speed WiFi available throughout the property for staying connected.
fas fa-spa|Wellness & Relaxation|Enjoy our spa services, massage therapy, and tranquil outdoor spaces for rejuvenation.
fas fa-users|Event Support|We cater to weddings, meetings, and special events with customized packages.
fas fa-calendar-alt|Flexible Booking|Flexible check-in/check-out times and reservation options to suit your travel plans.
fas fa-shield-alt|Secure & Reliable|Secure bookings with mobile money payments and instant confirmations.
fas fa-map-marker-alt|Tour Arrangements|We assist with booking guided tours, bird watching, and nature walks in the area.
